Risk Description: Opening of the Moorgate Crossrail station is delayed further.
Mitigating Action: Regular engagement with Crossrail from now to 2020/2021 to allow for alternative arrangements should there be a delay.

Risk Description: The Riney highways contract is due to expire in the summer of 2022. Any slippage in starting the construction programme may mean we have to consider a new Principal Contractor for the later stages of delivery.
Mitigating Action: Discussions to take place internally should this risk look more probable on how work would be transferred to a new contractor.
Regular engagement with developers from now until completion of the developments to allow for alternative arrangements and early notification of any delays.
Risk Description: Delays to the four developments surrounding the Moorgate Crossrail station delay the final delivery phases of the MCSL project.

Mitigating Action: Set expectations early regarding major physical constraints and work closely with stakeholders to identify design solutions that minimize extensive physical changes.
Risk Description: Infrastructure and utilities difficulties at the Moorgate junction with London Wall and Ropermaker Street make it difficult or too expensive to design and transform the space and enhance safety.
Key stakeholder(s) do not endorse design options
Mitigating Action: Ensure that Stakeholder Working Group is suitably engaged and involved in design option reviews.
Work with internal stakeholders to minimize any impacts should changes arise.
Risk Description: Delays/changes to dependency projects, such as Beech Street and St. Paul's Gyratory.
Breakdown in engagement with key stakeholders, such as Islington Council.
Mitigating Action: Ensure coherent communications with stakeholders at strategic points throughout the project, particularly regarding proposed boundary solutions.

Risk Description: TfL restructure may mean that no dedicated scheme sponsor / resource can be allocated to progress any required TfL approvals.
Mitigating Action: Officers will seek to establish resources as early as possible and keep close contact to understand the extent of the restructure, seeking reassurance of resource if needed.

Risk Description: There is a potential that the proposed scheme could impact negatively on the protected characteristics under the Equalities Act, 2010.
Mitigating Action: Meetings with representative groups will be conducted regularly to design out issues of concern, and an Equalities Act plan will be prepared.
Seek to ensure that an appropriate level of resilience is allowed for when designing Moorgate junctions at London Wall and Ropemaker Street.
Risk Description: Requirement to keep the ability for resilience/flexibility through the area in traffic terms restricts the options that can be developed.
